mapper.sql: c.id, c.full_name, c.active_full_name, c.competition_year, c.competition_date, c.participation_mode, c.create_time, c.deleted_at
mapper.select: select from competition c where c.id = #{id} and c.deleted_at is null
select from competition c where c.id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert: insert into competition (full_name, active_full_name, competition_year, competition_date, participation_mode, create_time, deleted_at) values (#{fullName}, #{fullName}, #{competitionYear}, #{competitionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{participationMode}, coalesce(#{createTime}, now()), null)
mapper.update: update competition set deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, active_full_name = null where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select id from competition where deleted_at is not null and deleted_at <= #{cutoff} order by deleted_at, id for update
mapper.delete: delete from competition where id = #{id} and deleted_at is not null
mapper.select:
select competition_id, type from competition_type_tag
where competition_id in
#{competitionId}
where 1 = 0
order by competition_id, type

select p.id, p.competition_id, p.username, p.display_name_snapshot, coalesce(u.nickname, p.display_name_snapshot) as display_name, p.create_time from competition_participant p left join `user` u on u.username = p.username
where p.competition_id in
#{competitionId}
where 1 = 0
order by p.competition_id, p.id

select a.id, a.competition_id, a.award_mode, a.team_name, a.award_scope, a.award_level, a.rank_position, a.rank_total, a.award_name, a.requires_login, a.create_time from competition_award a
where a.competition_id in
#{competitionId}
where 1 = 0
order by a.competition_id, a.id

select car.competition_id, car.award_id, car.participant_id, p.username, p.display_name_snapshot, coalesce(u.nickname, p.display_name_snapshot) as display_name from competition_award_recipient car join competition_participant p on p.id = car.participant_id left join `user` u on u.username = p.username
where car.competition_id in
#{competitionId}
where 1 = 0
order by car.competition_id, car.award_id, car.participant_id

select p.competition_id, ca.participant_id, ca.blog_id, b.title, ca.create_time from competition_article ca join competition_participant p on p.id = ca.participant_id join blog b on b.id = ca.blog_id and b.deleted_at is null and b.is_published = true and b.is_internal = false
where p.competition_id in
#{competitionId}
where 1 = 0
order by p.competition_id, ca.participant_id, ca.blog_id
select p.id, p.competition_id, p.username, p.display_name_snapshot, p.display_name_snapshot as display_name, p.create_time from competition_participant p where p.id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert:
insert into competition_participant (competition_id, username, display_name_snapshot, create_time) values
(#{participant.competitionId}, #{participant.username}, #{participant.displayNameSnapshot}, coalesce(#{participant.createTime}, now()))
mapper.delete: delete from competition_participant where competition_id = #{competitionId} and id = #{participantId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from competition_award_recipient where participant_id = #{participantId}
select id, competition_id, award_mode, team_name, award_scope, award_level, rank_position, rank_total, award_name, requires_login, create_time from competition_award where id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert: insert into competition_award (competition_id, award_mode, team_name, award_scope, award_level, rank_position, rank_total, award_name, requires_login, create_time) values (#{competitionId}, #{awardMode}, #{teamName}, #{awardScope}, #{awardLevel}, #{rankPosition}, #{rankTotal}, #{awardName}, #{requiresLogin}, coalesce(#{createTime}, now()))
mapper.delete: delete from competition_award where competition_id = #{competitionId} and id = #{awardId}
mapper.insert:
insert into competition_award_recipient (competition_id, award_id, participant_id) values
(#{recipient.competitionId}, #{recipient.awardId}, #{recipient.participantId})

insert into competition_article (participant_id, blog_id, create_time) select p.id, b.id, now() from competition_participant p join competition c on c.id = p.competition_id and c.deleted_at is null join `user` u on u.username = p.username join blog b on b.id = #{blogId} and b.user_id = u.id and b.deleted_at is null and b.is_published = true and b.is_internal = false where p.id = #{participantId} and p.username = #{username}
mapper.select: select car.competition_id, car.award_id, car.participant_id, car.profile_visible, car.profile_sort_order from competition_award_recipient car join competition_participant p on p.id = car.participant_id and p.competition_id = car.competition_id join competition c on c.id = car.competition_id and c.deleted_at is null where p.username = #{username} and car.profile_visible = true order by car.profile_sort_order, car.award_id for update

select c.id as competition_id, c.full_name as competition_full_name, c.competition_year, c.competition_date, ctt.type as competition_type, a.id as award_id, a.award_mode, a.team_name, a.award_scope, a.award_level, a.rank_position, a.rank_total, a.award_name, a.requires_login, car.profile_visible, car.profile_sort_order from competition_participant p join competition_award_recipient car on car.participant_id = p.id join competition_award a on a.id = car.award_id join competition c on c.id = a.competition_id and c.deleted_at is null left join competition_type_tag ctt on ctt.competition_id = c.id where p.username = #{username} order by car.profile_visible desc, case when car.profile_visible then car.profile_sort_order end, c.competition_year desc, c.id desc, a.id, ctt.type
